entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Zea mays L., a crop studied for grain yield across climate analogue sites

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor L., a crop studied for grain yield across climate analogue sites

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a crop studied for grain yield across climate analogue sites

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Vigna unguiculata L., a crop studied for grain yield across climate analogue sites

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The primary trait measured to evaluate crop performance under different climate conditions

entities.name: GROWTH PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of crop growth, categorized as short, medium, or long

entities.name: CLIMATE ANALOGUE
entities.description: A method of identifying current locations that mimic predicted future climate conditions

entities.name: WARMER CLIMATES
entities.description: Predicted future temperature increases that threaten agricultural production

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: A condition where farmers lack consistent access to sufficient food

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: An economic condition that limits the adaptive capacity of smallholder farmers

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASE
entities.description: A biological condition that prevented cowpea grain yield at the cooler site

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the climate analogue sites were located and the study was conducted

entities.name: KADOMA
entities.description: A higher-temperature analogue site for Mazowe in Zimbabwe

entities.name: MAZOWE
entities.description: A cooler site for wetter areas in Zimbabwe

entities.name: CHIREDZI
entities.description: A higher-temperature analogue site for Matobo in Zimbabwe

entities.name: MATOBO
entities.description: A cooler site for drier areas in Zimbabwe

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The broader region containing Zimbabwe and affected by climate-induced food insecurity

entities.name: ADAPTIVE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of farmers to adjust to climate change and its effects

entities.name: PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: The agricultural frameworks used by smallholder farmers for crop production
